_metadata.source: Hand-curated list of the dominant direct-to-consumer e-commerce platforms used by independent U.S. farms. Used by find_farms_with_online_store to detect when a farm has DTC e-commerce.
_metadata.review_cadence: Annually, or whenever a user reports a new platform.
_metadata.matching_rules: Match against website URL host, path fragments, or embedded subdomain patterns. A single platform match is sufficient to mark a farm as 'has_online_store'.
_metadata.note: These platforms are farm-first checkout systems. Many farms also use Shopify, Square Online, or a custom site; those generic platforms are intentionally NOT in this list because matching on them would generate false positives across all retail categories. v0.2 may add a generic-shop fallback that requires additional farm signals.

platforms.name: GrazeCart
platforms.audience: Pasture-based meat farms primarily; also dairy and produce.

platforms.name: Local Line
platforms.audience: Diverse farm types; widely adopted in U.S. and Canada.

platforms.name: Farmigo
platforms.audience: Farm-to-community group buying. Smaller footprint post-2016 pivot.

platforms.name: LocalHarvest
platforms.audience: Directory and storefront for farms, CSAs, and farmers markets. A LocalHarvest profile signals an active independent farm.
